name: cadence
description: Point it at your project and it runs a fleet of cheap health scanners in parallel, predicts what to build next, and grows its own checklist over time.

scripts.test: node lib/cadence.cjs --dir=. --once >/dev/null && node examples/demo.cjs >/dev/null && echo ok
scripts.check: node --check lib/cadence.cjs && node --check lib/cycles.cjs && node --check examples/demo.cjs && echo ok
